approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies hedge accounting for recognised items, which is a canonical hedge-accounting model potentially relevant to foreign-exchange risk on a recognised receivable.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies hedge accounting for forecast transactions and cash-flow variability, including foreign-currency risk on eligible forecast intragroup transactions in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 identify hedging of a net investment in a foreign operation as a distinct top-level hedge-accounting model for foreign-exchange risk in consolidated financial statements.
